channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-9664] sanity-hsm test_9a: @@@@@@ FAIL: mds4 CDT state is not 'disabled'
item.description:
== sanity-hsm test 9a: Multiple remote agents ======================================================== 01:59:31 (1491530371)
Killing existing copytools on lm0308,lm0309,lm0310
pdsh@lm0307: lm0309: ssh exited with exit code 1
pdsh@lm0307: lm0310: ssh exited with exit code 1
pdsh@lm0307: lm0310: ssh exited with exit code 1
pdsh@lm0307: lm0308: ssh exited with exit code 1

copytools stopped in 2s

item.summary: sanity-hsm test_9a: @@@@@@ FAIL: mds4 CDT state is not 'disabled'

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Minh Diep (minh.diep@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/31256
Subject: LU-9664 hsm: protect cdt_state
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: b2_10
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 1f01c1c3786d3bd2c79698706bb77f49d750e4fa

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/27634/
Subject: LU-9664 hsm: protect cdt_state
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 873c843ea158be8300b39582d74ff021ffae9b2f
the patch https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/27634/ has been updated

Hongchao Zhang (hongchao.zhang@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/27634
Subject: LU-9664 hsm: protect cdt_state
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 7eb81f4f7f0a0c731e1afe36a6fef56e98d08eab
